1.description: Retrieves supporting knowledge content from the knowledge corpus, including published articles, runbooks, SOPs, troubleshooting guides, how-to instructions, diagnostic checklists, known-issue write-ups, first-response playbooks, reference material, workarounds, and documented resolution guidance. This agent supports both topic search and entity-scoped KB search about a record, CI, asset, service, or issue. Use it when the user wants information, guidance, documentation, or self-help/technician instructions. This agent does not return the record's own stored field values, does not find peer tickets, does not triage tickets, and does not fulfil or provision services on behalf of the user.

skills.name: Search the knowledge base
skills.description: Retrieve ranked knowledge content that helps a user or technician understand, troubleshoot, configure, diagnose, validate, or resolve a topic, issue, service, record, CI, or asset. Use this skill when the user wants guidance, documentation, how-to steps, KB articles, runbooks, SOPs, checklists, known-issue write-ups, or workarounds. Do not use this skill when the user wants the system or service desk to perform fulfilment, change access, install software, assign a license, order hardware, increase quota, create a request, summarize record fields, find similar tickets, or triage a ticket.
use_when: the user asks how to fix, troubleshoot, diagnose, configure, validate, check, resolve, recover, or understand an IT issue or task
the user asks for a KB article, guide, documentation, runbook, SOP, procedure, playbook, checklist, workaround, known solution, known-issue write-up, or reference material
the user describes symptoms and wants guidance, steps, instructions, or what to do from an informational/self-help perspective
the user asks what guidance, documentation, or knowledge exists for a topic, issue, service, CI, asset, incident, request, problem, or change

the user asks for general workplace IT help where the expected output is instructions rather than fulfilment, such as email setup, Wi-Fi setup, printer setup, browser cache, MFA reset steps, VPN error troubleshooting, or network drive mapping
the user wants entity-scoped knowledge about a record without asking for that record's own stored fields
the user reports a symptom, error, or that something is broken, slow, failing, or not working with no explicit how-to verb, and wants it understood or resolved
not_when: the user wants the stored facts, field values, status, priority, owner, SLA, comments, work notes, timeline, or linked records of a specific record; route to uc01_summarization
the user wants other existing tickets, duplicates, peer records, historical cases, or similar incidents/requests; route to uc02_similar_tickets

the user wants the organization, system, or service desk to perform fulfilment on their behalf, including granting access, provisioning an account, installing software, assigning a license, ordering hardware, increasing quota, creating a mailbox, onboarding a user, configuring a service, or creating a service request; route to uc08_fulfillment
the user explicitly asks to create, update, modify, approve, fulfil, assign, close, reopen, or mutate a record; route to the relevant action agent
the user wants category, priority, impact, urgency, assignment group, or assignee recommendations in an operator triage workflow; route to uc05_triage
the user asks for a root-cause or known-error value that is stored directly on a specific problem record; route to uc01_summarization
examples: show the troubleshooting guide for VPN connection failures
find the KB article for MFA reset steps
what runbook explains Outlook sync delay
show documentation for mapping a network drive
find a known-issue article for SSO login failures
what steps should a user follow to configure email on a device
show the checklist for diagnosing printer connectivity
find the workaround documented for portal login errors
negative_examples: provision VPN access for this user
order a laptop for a new employee
show tickets similar to this issue
recommend category and priority for this ticket
assign a software license to me
